titleStmt.title: SII 39.81: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 81. (A.R. No. 81 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌLANATHA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL. MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVANA CHA[KRAVARTIN] KULAŚĒKHARA DĒVA, WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE [ALL COUNTRIES]-22ND YEAR [13TH CENTURY A.D.]

summary.p: This inscription refers to a land which was sold publicly to the temple of Tirukkōḷakkuḍi in Puṟamalai nāḍu a subdivision of Poṉṉamarāvati-paṟṟu by the ūrār of Viraiyāchchilai in Kānānāḍu, a subdivision of Kāṉanāḍu alias Virudarājabhayaṅkaravaḷanāḍu in order to pay the taxes due by them. Mentions the temple as Ulagaviḍaṅgīśvaramuḍaiyanāyaṉār. It also states that the original documents connected with the land were deposited in the same temple. Also mentions the oppression by some tax collectors of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī makkittikku mel komārapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉa cakravattikaḷemmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulacekara tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2 kumpa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ kāṉa ṉāṭāṉa viruta
rācapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭuk kāṉanāṭṭup paṭaippaṟṟu viraiyāccilai Ūrom Eṅkaḷūrkkuk kaṭamaikkut tevar kaṇṭiyatevar vācalil karumañcevārkaḷil Eṅkaḷ nāṭu piṭitta tirunelveliyuṭaiyār Eṅkaḷukku Ivvāṇṭai kaṭamai niṟceyiṟpukkum muṉpoṉa vāṇṭai cikaikkum nālāyiram paṇam vari kuṭṭu Itukku Eṅkaḷūr Āṟru Ūrumāyc cāpopo perumāṉpaṭiyāle Eṅkaḷ Aṭṭikuṭi kaṉṟukāli Akappaṭa viṟṟum Ēṟṟivaittum pokkiṭalāvatu pokkiṭa Ic
celavaṟṟu calavarāta paṇattiṟku veṟoru pōkku yillātapaṭiyālum Akāṟamāyp paṇattukku mukkā nellumāy veṟuoru nāḷ Orukācu taṉicu taruvārumiṉṟi mirukkaiyālum Uṭaiyār tirunelveli Uṭaiyār paṉṉāta muṭṭuppāṭu paṇṇukaiyil I
ṉṉāṭṭuk kumāttaṅkuṭi Ūravar pakkal Iv vataṟku muṉpu Eṅkaḷūr Aracu makkaḷil rāmpo Uḷḷiṭṭār vilai koṇṭu Eṅkaḷūr puravil Ēraṭṭu Āṟupokattu kaṭamai Iṟuttu potukiṟa kuṭikāṭu nāṭṭupperaiyaṉ viṟpataṟku Icaiñcu koḷvār Uḷaro Eṉṟu Orukālāvatum Irukālāvatum mukkālāvatum nāṅkaḷ muṟkūṟak koḷveṉeṉṟu ponṉamarāpatippaṟṟup puṟamalaināṭṭu tirukkoḷakku
ṭi Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭecuratevaṟku Ūrañcāta Ūr kīḻ Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇi vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu Ippaṭi viṟpataṟku Icaiñca Ikkuṭikkāṭu nāṭṭup peraiyaṉukku
perunāṉ kellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟkellai muṉ kuḷattut teṉvaṭalāka pokiṟa peruvaḻik kuṭakumaṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ikkumāttakkuṭi Ellaikkuṭa vaṭakkum meṟpāṟkellai Eṅkaḷūr nāyaṉār Ulakaliṭaṅkīcuramuṭaiya nāya
ṉār tevatāṉam mutaliyārk koyil vācal pāccamutaliyār paṟṟu Aiññūṟṟu maṅkalattu vayalkkuḷaṅ kovaikkuk kiḻakkum Iṉṉāṭṭup peraiyaṉ kuḷattukku nīreṟṟam Ikkum kovai melvarampukku meṟku Ēriṉamaṭṭam Ēṟuvatākavum vaṭapā
k kellai muṉṉāḷ Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉārkku nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili tirukāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟa Iṉnāṭṭā teṟkum nāṭṭup peraiyaṉ kuḷattukku nīrvāykkāl mutaliyār kuṭakkāṭu Aiññūṟṟu maṅkalattuk kuḷattil vaṭakaṭaiyai Aṭuttum vaṭavaya
lai Aṭuttum vaṭakku kīḻ melāka varukiṟa Ikkuḷattukkut teṉkaṭaiyil muṉpilāṇṭu varum mariyātippaṭi Uḷḷa kālnīr pāyvatākavum Āka Icaiñca perunāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilattil Uṇṇil moḻiviṉṟi nīrnilamum puṉceyyum nattamum toṭṭamu kuḷamum kuḷapparippu
m maramuṅ kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa sarvvaprāpti Uḷpaṭa Ūrañci Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Emmil Icaiñca vilaipporuḷukku Ūrkīḻ Iṟaiyili Āka vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu vilaipiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi
ṭaiya nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭecura tevaṟku viṟaiyāccilai Araicu makkaḷum mutalikaḷum Ūrāka Icaiñca Ūrom Ippaṭi viṟṟa Ikkuṭikāṭu nāṭṭup peraiyaṉ Iṉnāḷ mutal Eṅkaḷūrppuṟa kaḻittu Ikkuṭikkāṭṭukku varum kaṭamai Accuvari poṉvari viniokam pañcupili cantuvik
kirakappeṟu veṭṭimuṭṭālāḷ cevakam Eṟcoṟu kūṟṟarici cilvari peruvari Ūr viṉiōkam maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum Eṅkaḷūrile Ēṟṟi Iṟuttu ppotuvomākavum Ippaṭic cammatittu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Āticaṇṭeśva
ra tevaṟku viraiyāccilai Araicu makaḷum maṟmutalikaḷum Ūrāka Icaica Ūrom Ippaṭi Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟa Inta nāṭṭu peraiyaṉukku Emmilicaiñca vilaipporuḷ niṟcayitta paṇam 8 100m parivaṭṭam paṇam 2 100m Āka 1000 Ippaṇam Āyiramum vilaiyāvaṉa
k kaḷattekāṭṭi Ēṟṟi kaiccala koṇṭu Ippaṭi viṟṟa Iṉnāṭṭup peraiyaṉukku Ituve vilaiōlaiyāvutākavum Itu vallatu veṟuvilai Ēṟṟip poruḷ māvaṟuti poruḷ calaōlai kāṇiyuṅ kāṭṭavum kaṭavatāvākavu kāṇil kīṟṟum kiḻiyum parivatākavum muṉpu velayil kumāttakkuṭi Ūrpakkal
Araicu makkaḷil kāmpotirāyar Uḷḷiṭṭār vilaikoṇṭa mulacātaṉamum Iṉnāyaṉār śrī paṇṭārattile Oṭukka Iccātaṉattukku Ōlaikkuṟṟam Eḻuttukkuṟṟam colkuṟṟam maṟṟum Ekkuṟṟamum kuṟṟamalla Āṉatākavum Ippaṭi viṟṟa Iṉnāṭṭup peraiyaṉ vayalukkum kuḷattukkum perunāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūla
kallum nāṭṭak kuṭuttu cantirātityavar celvatāka Iṟaiyili tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka Aṉupokittup potuvatāka Iṟaiyili tirukkāmattukkāṇiyāka vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkoṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭeśvara tevaṟku vilaiyāccilai Araicu makkaḷum
maṟa mutalikaḷum Ūrāka Icaiñca Ūrom
Digital edition of SII 39.81 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
